title: Supplementary Protocol between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Kingdom of Denmark amending the Convention for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income, signed at London on 27 March 1950, as modified by the Protocols signed at London 7 July 1966 and on 18 December 1968
subject: TAXATION
